steps.title: Spot why humans fail the engineering requirements
steps.content: Fabry says humans are not effective and no longer answer the requirements of modern engineering. The connection between ineffectiveness and failing to answer requirements is the key signal—it shows what answers must convey.

steps.title: Choose the word with that meaning
steps.content:
In context, answers the requirements means to satisfy or meet them. Fulfills expresses this meaning precisely. Explains, Rebuts, and Defends describe actions unrelated to meeting standards.

Humans no longer fulfill what modern engineering demands. That matches choice D — D is correct.
